name: Buglar Wheat with Raisins & Cinnamon
recipeInstructions:
1. In a nonstick 2-quart pot, melt the margarine.
2. Saute onion and celery until tender, stirring often.
3. Stir in the bulgur wheat and continue cooking until the bulgur is coated and turns golden brown.
4. Blend in the broth, garlic, pepper, and tarragon.
5. Add raisins, cinnamon, and salt, and mix well.
6. Cover and continue cooking for 15-17 minutes or until all liquid has been absorbed.
7. Serve hot as cereal or as a grain side dish.
